title: Balanced Search Trees and Order Statistics · Structure Brief: Balanced Tree Choice
summary: Maintain an ordered index with predictable latency during sorted and mixed updates. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 balanced tree choice increment in a balanced-tree trace and order-statistic extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare balanced trees with sorted arrays, heaps, and hash tables by workload.
Maintain subtree aggregates for rank, select, interval, or range queries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
